- [ ] New numerical method (geodesic, PDE, spectral, AMR...)
- [ ] New diagnostic (energy condition, curvature invariant, stability)
- [ ] New visualization (embedding, Penrose, lensing, interactive)

**Validation plan**
What analytic limit, conserved quantity, or published figure would confirm it is

**Additional context**
References, equations, or related issues.
